title: NN6 7QR, Bridge House Farm Limited environmental permit issued – EPR/QP3831MX/S008
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Bridge House Farm Limited   Installation name: Bridge House Farm Pig Unit   Permit number: EPR/QP3831MX/S008   "
